articles.title: Uncertainty is the biggest force shaping Australia's housing market
articles.description: Australia's property market faces an "unusual problem" beyond interest rates and inflation

articles.title: Domestic Flights Saved from Massive Fare Hike: ‘Only 25% Fuel Hike Passed To Airlines’ - Check Latest Rates Here
articles.description: Government capped ATF price hike for domestic flights at 25% despite a global surge, preventing sharp fare increases, while international routes bear full costs amid volatile oil markets and Strait of Hormuz disruption., Economy, Times Now

articles.title: case risk, but energy to stay higher for longer: Matt Orton
articles.description: Matt Orton, Chief Market Strategist at Raymond James Investment, says tail risks in markets are easing, but unresolved geopolitical tensions and supply disruptions could keep oil prices high and influence inflation and policy.

articles.title: US Stock Market | Rising war costs and inflation risks cloud outlook for US bond market
articles.description: U.S. bond markets face mounting inflation risks and potential fiscal burdens from a prolonged conflict, as surging energy prices push Treasury yields higher. Investors are reassessing Federal Reserve rate cut expectations amid concerns over increased defense spending and potential fiscal stimulus, straining a market already showing fatigue.

articles.title: 'Rajbhog kha ke gaya tha': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 'sweet secret' behind CSK carnage - WATCH
articles.description: Cricket News: NEW DELHI: Smashing bowlers, tonking pacers and spinners for big sixes, and dismantling their economy rates seems routine for young batting sensation .

articles.title: Iran War Unwinds A Year Of Investor Bets On Trump's Tariffs
articles.description: Global stocks, which had rallied on the back of the AI boom and falling interest rates, have lost about $14 trillion in value since the conflict began, as risk appetite evaporated.

articles.title: US Stock Market | Wall Street soars as traders bet on potential war off-ramp
articles.description: Indian markets saw a significant boost as Wall Street surged on hopes of peace in the Middle East. This development eased concerns over rising oil prices and inflation. Major US indexes experienced their biggest gains since May 2025. Technology stocks like Nvidia and Alphabet performed strongly.

articles.title: China Tightens Grip on Consumer Lending Platforms to Force Down Interest Rates
articles.description: China Tightens Grip on Consumer Lending Platforms to Force Down Interest Rates - Financial regulators are drafting unified pricing guidelines to cap borrowing costs at 12%, pushing tech giants like Ant Group and Tencent to stress-test their massive credit portfolios

articles.title: Diverging Paths: Central Banks Face Uneven Inflation Challenges
articles.description: While past inflationary shocks saw unified central bank actions, the current economic climate may lead to divergent policy responses due to differing inflation levels and geopolitical conflicts. With energy prices spiking again, central banks are cautious about adjusting interest rates, potentially leading to varied economic impacts across regions.

articles.title: Greece set to rejoin MSCI developed markets index in 2027
articles.description: Greek stocks will ‌return to MSCI’s developed markets index in May 2027, the index provider said on Tuesday, marking the latest step in the Greek economy's normalization after a debt crisis that began in 2009.
